items.name_en: New Arrival French High-End Custom Chanel
items.name_cn:
New Arrival French High-End Custom Chanel
Chane1🖤23A Diamond Handle CF Early Drop AS4141🥇Large
The most grandest collection of the year, the Atelier collection was originally scheduled to launch in June, but unexpectedly launched quietly in May🦢
This is the style I'm most looking forward to this season, and it's already out of stock rhythm💓
I got both sizes, the handle is leather with metal and diamonds💗
🖤The diamond handle is just too beautiful, no girl can resist it
🎗️size:14-20-7CM

items.name_en: New Arrival French High-End Custom Chanel
items.name_cn:
New Arrival French High-End Custom Chanel
Chane 23s |🖤This season's little black shell bag AS5130 patent leather👸🏻
This season's very eye-catching Chanel patent leather shell bag💎💎
Although it's small (even shorter than the wallet I bought ten years ago.......) it can hold keys, compact powder, lipstick, and even a folded Samsung phone. Very cute!🐶🐶
My SA is obsessed after seeing the real thing!
I think it's the cutest bag this season, and the value for money is better than other small bags🥇Size:15-20-6CM

items.name_en: New Arrival French·High-End Custom Chanel
items.name_cn:
New Arrival French·High-End Custom Chanel
AS4133# Chanel23A The Ultimate Mini31bag A Fashion Icon! The classic 31bag returns, timeless style!
Two sizes, large and mini, to suit different styles~ The large is super cool and chic, the mini is obedient, cute, and charming.
This chocolate brown is also a treasure color, the most recommended besides black. The real thing is very durable and high-end!
Reptile leather, practical capacity, one bag for multiple occasions is no problem!
size:22x23x5.5cm

items.name_en: New Arrival M14231 [Lx TM Pochette Métis East West Handbag] M14231 Cherry. This Pochette Métis East West handbag is from the x Murakami Re-Imagined series, dyeing the Monogram coated canvas in soft new-season tones that complement the sweet cherry pattern in the artist's work. The glossy S-lock buckle lights up the overall design, and the exquisite structure features multiple compartments, making it an elegant choice for daily travel. Detailed Features - 13.5 x 6 x 21.5 cm
items.name_cn: New Arrival M14231 [Lx TM Pochette Métis East West Handbag] M14231 Cherry. This Pochette Métis East West handbag is from the x Murakami Re-Imagined series, dyeing the Monogram coated canvas in soft new-season tones that complement the sweet cherry pattern in the artist's work. The glossy S-lock buckle lights up the overall design, and the exquisite structure features multiple compartments, making it an elegant choice for daily travel. Detailed Features - 13.5 x 6 x 21.5 cm

items.name_en: New Arrival M14238 [Speedy Soft 30 Handbag] M14238 White Flower/Cherry. Encounter the unique aesthetics of the x Murakami Re-Imagined series. The Monogram coated canvas features a clean color palette to highlight the brilliant and passionate cherry pattern by the Japanese artist. The denim construction forms the inner layer, while the Toron top handle and detachable Toron shoulder strap are crafted from leather, and the bow-shaped key case adds rich details. Detailed Features - 17 x 30 x 21 cm.

items.name_en: New Arrival Montaigne Collection💗30 AVENUE 💗
items.name_cn:
New Arrival Montaigne Collection💗30 AVENUE 💗
Crafted from blue Oblique fabric with refined rounded corners, featuring a vintage gold-finish metal CD buckle inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle.
The back is embossed with the 30 Montaigne logo, paired with a classic chain made of alternating gold-finish metal and enamel links in the same tone as the leather. The pleated design offers spacious storage and a refined silhouette, suitable for hand-carry, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
✨Small body, big capacity
🌟The CD connection on the chain is more exquisite
Size:22.5*12.5*6.5

specs.rawTitle:
New Arrival Montaigne Collection💗30 AVENUE 💗
Crafted from blue Oblique fabric with refined rounded corners, featuring a vintage gold-finish metal CD buckle inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle.
The back is embossed with the 30 Montaigne logo, paired with a classic chain made of alternating gold-finish metal and enamel links in the same tone as the leather. The pleated design offers spacious storage and a refined silhouette, suitable for hand-carry, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
✨Small body, big capacity
🌟The CD connection on the chain is more exquisite
Size:22.5*12.5*6.5

items.name_cn:

Size: 18*24*17 cm

items.name_en: New arrival printed hourglass bag large ☀ Balenciaga Paris,👉 This season's heavy hitter pearlescent hourglass bag, unique iconic curved shape is highly recognizable 💗, instantly eye-catching and super cool, appearance presents a crescent moon shape 💘 with a metal B-shaped ring ✨, cowhide texture is also very impressive and full of style, daily essentials or carefully selected versatile and trendy, this Parisian hourglass bag will definitely explode in popularity this year, elegant exquisite and unique, instantly eye-catching, hard not to be noticed ⚠ 😄, handheld or crossbody looks amazing 😍, absolutely a goddess' favorite, of course I love it to death! Can be salty or sweet, that's the effect. Capacity tested: phone, coin purse, compact powder, lipstick, power bank, keys, small pack of tissues, all can be easily loaded, inspection available. Size: Large 23-10-14cm
